text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today Tracen is holding a cops and<n>robbers
tournament. This event<n>allows elementary school
students<n>aiming for Tracen to interact with
current students at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text:
The cops win if they capture all of the<n>robbers
before the time runs out!

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text: But if even one robber remains, the<n>robbers win!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I'm a robber, so I just need to make<n>sure I don't
get caught while the<n>clock is ticking, right? Piece
of pie!

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text:
Trainers and volunteers from the<n>shopping
district are here to ensure<n>that the team they've
been assigned<n>to plays safely!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? If you're here, that means...<n>you're a
robber too?!
choice_data_list: I'm just here to keep an eye on things.
I'm just here to keep an eye on things.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat the details! You're one<n>of us! I'll
smash right through<n>everyone, so you'll have
nothing to<n>worry about!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There are so many Tracen Academy<n>students
here! C'mon, cops! We've<n>gotta win this!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best! I can't be the<n>reason my
team loses!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Forgive my intrusion, but I'll be<n>offering my
assistance to ensure that<n>the cops team
emerges triumphant.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Leave everything to me. I shall create<n>an
effective team strategy that will<n>keep your
stamina levels in mind.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Their team's totally<n>pumped!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Awww yeah! We'll just have to step<n>up our
game! Let's go, robbers!

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text: Right, everyone! On your marks, get<n>set...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BANG!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: ALL RIGHT! Run away as fast as you<n>can!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The game starts with a chaotic game<n>of
cat-and-mouse, but as time<n>passes, the cop team
begins to slow<n>down.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hey! How come the cops aren't<n>chasing us like
they were before?!<n>What's goin' on?! Don't
keep me<n>waitin' here!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Running around haphazardly only<n>serves to
deplete our energy.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Let us calmly lie in wait and observe<n>the
enemy's movements.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell Twin Turbo that the cops are<n>going with
Ikuno Dictus's strategy of<n>minimal energy
consumption and<n>efficient arrests.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! The heck's with that?!
Boooooriiiiing!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run around! I wanna play tag<n>with
everyone!
choice_data_list: You'll fall right into their trap if you rush out now.
You'll fall right into their trap if you rush out now.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm super fast. I'll be totally fine.
choice_data_list: Do you have a strategy in mind?
Do you have a strategy in mind?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Nope, but I'm tough, so I'llbe fine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe Twin Turbo's planning to<n>draw the
attention of the whole cop<n>team herself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe Twin Turbo's planning to<n>draw the
attention of the whole cop<n>team herself.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me! Turbooo... GOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Found ya, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Turbo?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Waaait! I'm not letting you get away,<n>coppers!
Take me on, fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait! Wait! Stay awaaay!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you chasing aftermeee?!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's happening?

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Is this a special rule or something?<n>Should we
run away too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No. Please stay as you are. I'd like<n>you all to
remain on standby.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...It would be best to stop her as soon<n>as
possible, but that would be a tough<n>task.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yahooooo! Wait up, punks! Ahahaha!Now we're really playing copsand robbers!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Twin Turbo somehow chasing<n>the cops, the
cops and robbers<n>tournament descends into
mayhem<n>and is eventually called to a
temporary halt.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahaha! You're not goin'<n>anywhere,
coppers! Take me on, fair<n>and—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek! T-Turbo?!

text_block_list.name: Older Patrolman
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! Are you okay?! That was<n>quite the
face-plant...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Run with... me... fair and... square...<n>Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Bleh...

text_block_list.name: Patrolling Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, did she just pass out with a smile<n>on her
face?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What happened to the<n>tournament?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
What?! I-it's o-over?! But I didn't<n>even get to
run!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Sob... Awww, this suuuucks! ButI'll totally win next tiiiiime!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo bawls her eyes out as<n>she swears
an oath to the setting<n>sun...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What?! Why?! No, no, no! Nuh-uh!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run! I gotta run!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Cops! Now!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ikuno?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Siege successful. Your loud voice<n>served as a
beacon, allowing me to<n>lead everyone here
undetected.

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You can't get away now, Twin Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Now that's what I'm talkin'about!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: All you guys are gonna chase afterme?! I'm all in! C'mon, let's dothis!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four... Six of you! Six<n>against one!
Can you keep up with<n>me?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Turbo BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No! Wait, everyone! If you try to keep<n>up with
Turbo, you'll—

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I-It's no good...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
—only fall behind. I should have<n>warned you
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, both Twin Turbo and the<n>cops run out
of steam and the<n>tournament ends in a draw...
